title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 169.576 - Authorizes board to provide for reciprocal creditable service transfers with other states
text:
169.576.  Authorizes board to provide for reciprocal creditable service transfers with other states. — The board of any retirement system established in this chapter may enter into a cooperative agreement with the board of any retirement system for education employees in any other state for the purpose of allowing the transfer of creditable service.  Any such agreement shall meet the same terms as specified in section 105.691 for agreements with other retirement systems in Missouri.
(L. 1996 S.B. 860)
